candidates_considered.story: Fernando Mendoza Goes #1 Overall to Raiders
candidates_considered.hook: Cal transfer to Heisman winner to #1 pick in one year, Tom Brady connection

candidates_considered.story: Cardinals Take RB Jeremiyah Love at #3

PFT admitting he likes a Cowboy

stories.headline: Fernando Mendoza: From Cal Benchwarmer to #1 Overall Pick in 12 Months
stories.editorial_direction: This is the ultimate transfer portal success story. Go deep on the journey — Cal backup to Indiana starter to Heisman winner to #1 pick. Include the Tom Brady connection, the financial implications for the Raiders, and the historical context of Heisman winners going #1. This is a feel-good story about perseverance and betting on yourself.

tweets.text: The Shedeur effect: Kenyon Sadiq thought he was getting a prank call when the Jets called to inform him that they were selecting him in the first round.

Fernando Mendoza:

— Went Undefeated
— Won National Championship
— Won Heisman Trophy
— Went 1st-Overall in NFL Draft

One of four QBs to reach all of those accomplishments.

Raiders last three first-round picks:

2024 — Brock Bowers
2025 — Ashton Jeanty
2026 — Fernando Mendoza

Offensive firepower.
Fernando Mendoza looks like he just got drafted to be a financial advisor for the Raiders accounting department

Love, love Mendoza's personality. But promoting LinkedIn is worse than promoting Pornhub. 

Way more people getting fucked everyday on LinkedIn.

key_stats: First Heisman winner in Indiana history
Fifth Heisman winner ever drafted by Raiders
First QB Raiders selected #1 since JaMarcus Russell 2007
research_notes.historical_context: Only fourth QB since 1967 to win Heisman, national championship, AND go #1 overall (joins Cam Newton, Joe Burrow, Baker Mayfield). Mendoza's rise from two-star recruit to #1 pick is unprecedented speed.
research_notes.tom_brady_connection: Mendoza had FaceTime call with Brady before draft, said working with him 'would mean the world.' Brady is Raiders co-owner and promised to mentor whoever they draft. Mendoza said as six-year-old he wanted to be 'best friends' with Brady.
research_notes.transfer_portal_angle: Started as Cal backup, transferred to Indiana, became starter and Heisman winner in one season. Ultimate portal success story showing how one move can change everything.
research_notes.financial_context: Raiders coming off 3-14 season, franchise hasn't won playoff game in 24 years. Mendoza is expected franchise savior with Kirk Cousins and Aidan O'Connell in QB room.
research_notes.draft_night_drama: Didn't attend draft in Pittsburgh, stayed home in Miami with family. Emotional reaction when name called, longest hug for his mother. 320,000+ fans in Pittsburgh broke all-time Round 1 attendance record.
research_notes.internet_sentiment: Mix of respect for the journey and jokes about his appearance (looks like financial advisor). LinkedIn promotion joke went viral. General positive reaction to his personality and work ethic.
research_notes.where_it_goes: Raiders training camp battle with Cousins, potential Week 1 starter conversation, Tom Brady mentorship begins immediately. Historic turnaround story if he succeeds.

stories.headline: Cardinals Shock Everyone, Take RB Jeremiyah Love at #3 Overall
stories.editorial_direction: This is a massive reach that has everyone confused. Running back at #3 is shocking in today's NFL. Connect to the Notre Dame theme (two RBs from same school in Round 1 is historic), question the Cardinals' decision-making, and explore what this means for their roster construction.

tweets.text:
More about Cardinals selecting Jeremiyah Love with the No. 3 pick in the NFL draft, via @joshweinfuss:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48574729/cardinals-select-jeremiyah-love-no-3-pick-nfl-draft

With the final pick of Thursday night's first round, the Seahawks selected Notre RB Jadarian Price.

There never had been a year in which the top two running backs were selected from the same school. Now both Jeremiyah Love and Price accomplished that feat for the Fighting Irish.
The Arizona Cardinals having the wrong number for Jeremiah Love who they took with the 3rd pick is the most Cardinals thing ever
Tyler Allgeier after getting replaced for the second time in his career by a RB drafted in the Top 10

research_notes.positional_value_shock: RB at #3 overall in 2026 is stunning. Last RB taken in top 3 was Saquon Barkley 2018 at #2. Most analysts had Love as late first/early second round pick.
research_notes.notre_dame_history: First time ever two RBs from same school went in Round 1. Love at #3, Jadarian Price at #32 to Seahawks. Notre Dame had historic RB duo this season.
research_notes.cardinals_chaos: Had wrong jersey number for Love at announcement (most Cardinals thing ever). Team coming off disappointing season, questionable draft strategy.
research_notes.tyler_allgeier_pain: Allgeier replaced for second time by top-10 RB pick (first was Bijan Robinson). Veteran RB watching career get buried.
research_notes.draft_experts_confusion: Massive reach according to most boards. Cardinals could have traded down, still gotten Love later. Poor value at premium position.
research_notes.where_it_goes: Cardinals betting entire franchise direction on Love being generational talent. Huge pressure on rookie to justify #3 selection.

stories.headline: Rams Draft Their Stafford Replacement While He's Still MVP
stories.editorial_direction: This is awkward. Stafford is coming off an MVP season and the Rams just drafted his replacement at #13. Sean McVay's poker face, the timeline implications, and what this means for the Rams' championship window. Is this preparation or panic?

tweets.text:
More about the Rams selecting QB Ty Simpson with No. 13 pick in the NFL draft, via @sarahbarshop:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48575685/rams-select-qb-ty-simpson-no-13-pick-nfl-draft
The Rams having the chance to take an impact player to help the get back to the Super Bowl with the 13th pick…

research_notes.stafford_context: Matthew Stafford is 38, coming off reigning MVP season. Still playing at elite level but Rams clearly planning for future.
research_notes.simpson_background: Alabama QB who started only 15 college games. Considered reach at #13, projected as Day 2 pick by most analysts.
research_notes.mcvay_awkwardness: Sean McVay had conversation with Stafford about pick but won't reveal details. Extremely awkward to draft replacement of MVP.
research_notes.championship_window: Rams could have used #13 on immediate impact player to maximize Stafford's remaining elite years. Instead went with long-term planning.
research_notes.timeline_questions: How long will Stafford play? When does Simpson take over? Is this 2026 or 2027 or 2028 decision?
research_notes.internet_reaction: Confusion about timing, jokes about passing on win-now players for future QB while current QB is MVP.

stories.headline: Eagles Literally Steal Makai Lemon From Steelers While He's On Phone With Pittsburgh
stories.editorial_direction: This is draft drama at its peak. Lemon was literally talking to Pittsburgh when Philadelphia swooped in via trade. The AJ Brown trade rumors context makes this even more interesting. Eagles making moves while their current #1 WR might be traded.

tweets.text:
More about the Eagles trade with Cowboys to be in position to pick Makai Lemon at No. 20 in the NFL draft, via @Tim_McManus:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48576281/eagles-trade-cowboys-pick-makai-lemon-no-20-nfl-draft

research_notes.draft_drama: Lemon was on phone with Steelers when Eagles called to say they traded up to draft him. Ultimate draft heartbreak/excitement moment.
research_notes.trade_details: Eagles traded with Cowboys to move up to #20. Gave up future picks to ensure they got their guy before Pittsburgh.
research_notes.aj_brown_context: Eagles drafting WR while AJ Brown trade rumors swirl. Could be preparation for Brown departure or adding to receiving corps.
research_notes.steelers_heartbreak: Pittsburgh had Lemon on phone, thought they were getting him. Eagles swooped at last second.
research_notes.hometown_connection: USC receiver going to Philadelphia, Eagles clearly targeted him specifically to execute this trade.
research_notes.where_it_goes: Eagles receiving corps questions, Brown's future, and whether Lemon can contribute immediately.

stories.headline: Jets Go Full Rebuild Mode With Three First-Round Picks
stories.editorial_direction: Jets made three picks in Round 1 and will have three again in 2027. They're clearly tearing it down and building from scratch. Quick hit on their haul and what it means for the future.

tweets.text: The Jets made three first-round picks this year: No. 2 DE David Bailey, No. 16 TE Kenyon Sadiq, and No. 30 WR Omar Cooper Jr., and they'll have three first-round picks again in 2027.
With the No. 30 pick they acquired in a trade from the 49ers, the Jets selected Indiana WR Omar Cooper Jr.

research_notes.draft_haul: Three picks in 2026 Round 1: David Bailey (DE), Kenyon Sadiq (TE), Omar Cooper Jr. (WR). Plus three more in 2027.
research_notes.rebuild_strategy: Jets clearly in full teardown mode, accumulating young talent across multiple positions.
research_notes.future_capital: Having three first-rounders in consecutive years gives massive flexibility for trades or continued rebuilding.
research_notes.where_it_goes: Jets building foundation for next several years rather than competing in 2026.

stories.headline: Hawks Take 2-1 Lead As Mikal Bridges Posts Historic Bagel
stories.editorial_direction: CJ McCollum is destroying the Knicks in clutch time again, but the bigger story is Mikal Bridges scoring 0 points after the Knicks gave up five first-round picks for him. This is a disaster brewing in New York.

tweets.text:
Mikal Bridges in the Knicks' Game 3 loss to the Hawks:

0 Points
1 Rebound
2 Assists 
4 Turnovers 
21 Minutes of CARDIO

THE KNICKS GAVE UP FIVE FIRST-ROUND PICKS FOR HIM ‼️

Jalen Johnson in Game 3 vs NY:

24 PTS
10 REB
8 AST
2 STL

The first player in franchise history with those numbers in a playoff game.

CJ McCollum in Game 3 vs NY:

23 PTS
5 REB
2 STL
2 BLK

Hit the go-ahead bucket to secure the win for Atlanta.

research_notes.bridges_disaster: 0 points, 4 turnovers in 21 minutes. Knicks traded five first-round picks for him. Historic playoff bagel from max player.
research_notes.mccollum_clutch: 23 points, hit go-ahead bucket with 12.5 seconds left. Second straight clutch performance against Knicks. Taking over series.
research_notes.hawks_depth: Jalen Johnson (24/10/8) and Jonathan Kuminga providing star-level production. Hawks getting contributions from everywhere.
research_notes.knicks_panic: Down 2-1 to team they should beat. Brunson struggling defensively, Towns invisible in fourth quarters (2 points total in last two).
research_notes.series_context: Hawks won 19 of last 24 games, proving they're legitimate threat. Game 4 Saturday becomes must-win for Knicks.
research_notes.where_it_goes: Knicks season on brink, Bridges trade looking like disaster, Hawks proving they belong in playoffs.

around_the_league.text: I hate how much I like Caleb downs and now hes a cowboy. This is the last time I will acknowlege this before burying it deep down inside me for the rest of his career

Jaden McDaniels in Game 3 vs Denver:

20 PTS
10 REB
9-13 FG

His first career 20/10 game in the playoffs.

Nikola Jokic after getting clamped by Rudy Gobert in Game 3: 

7-26 FG
2-10 3P
11-11 FREE THROWS 

MVP race is heating up 🔥

Ohio St. DT Kayden McDonald is staying in Pittsburgh for the NFL Draft, where he is expected to be picked early tonight. Commissioner Roger Goodell went to see McDonald after he was not selected in round one, and invited him to come back tonight so he could give him a hug on the stage once he is picked. McDonald and his family extended their stay in Pittsburgh and now will be back in the green room tonight.

The only players under 21 with 20+ PTS on 70+ FG% in a playoff game:

— Magic Johnson
— Tony Parker

and Collin Murray-Boyles.

Jacob deGrom vs Pirates:

5.2 IP
5 H
1 ER
1 BB
10 SO

He is the oldest pitcher with a 10-strikeout game this season.
More than 300,000 people stood outside for hours to listen to some dude in a suit read names off an index card. The European mind simply cannot comprehend this.

Yankees SP in the last two games:

16.0 IP
1 ER
14 SO

Yankees sweep a series at Fenway for the first time since 2021.
Ime Udoka fumbled Nia Long and the Rockets organization thought he was capable of making good decisions 😭😭

Bo Bichette is the only Met with multiple 3-hit games this season.

He leads the Mets in hits, doubles and RBI.

closer.hook: Draft weekend continues with Rounds 2-3 tonight

tweets.text: Fernandos little brother just got jokerfied in front of our eyes. This moment will drive him to exellence
